org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network

Class KernelMessage

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network.KernelMessage
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
 class KernelMessage
extends Object
implements Serializable
    Low level messages exchanged by kernels.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>
